/usr/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/AntiMagicSword.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/FireMagic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/Level.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/Level1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/Level2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/Level3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/SaveManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/Spell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/WindMagic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlackCloverGame.dir/main.cpp.o -o BlackCloverGame  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-audio.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
